results.title: TruD Website
results.content: Well-known fitness; biohacking influencer Ben Greenfield discusses factors that accelerate aging with TruDiagnostic's Ryan Smith. # Well-known fitness; biohacking influencer Ben Greenfield discusses factors that accelerate aging with TruDiagnostic's Ryan Smith. TruDiagnostic Founder Ryan Smith sits down with well-known fitness, wellness, and biohacking influencer Ben Greenfield, to discuss epigenetics and biological age testing. * What Ryan Smith would do if his biological age was less than optimal. The ability to track, measure, and optimize your biological age is a field rife with confusion and a dizzying variety of testing methods such as telomere analysis and methylation clocks, transcriptomic-based, proteomic-based, and metabolomic-based predictors, and composite biomarkers. But a new biological age test developed by a company called TruDiagnostic claims that it will change how we measure health and ultimately, how we can improve it using epigenetic testing. Ryan Smith is part of the team that developed the biological age test and worked to bring it to market.

results.title: TruDiagnostic™ Biological Age Test
results.content: 20% OFF ALL PRODUCTS + SUBSCRIPTIONS. # Decode Your DNA For Better Aging. TruDiagnostic™ offers a range of tests, including TruAge™ and TruHealth™, which provide a comprehensive view of your overall health and aging. ### Our Products. 11 Organ Systems Age Scores. 11 Organ Systems Age Scores (SYMPHONYAge™). Our SymphonyAge™ score decodes how your different organ systems are aging, like your brain, heart, liver, and lungs, as a key component of our TruAge™ test. #### Speed of Aging. Our DunedinPace™ score tracks your aging speed at the cellular level and gives personal recommendations to improve as a core insight of our TruAge™ test. Don’t wait to learn how your body is aging and how your biological systems are functioning. ### FAQs. Epigenetics refers to changes in gene activity that do not alter the DNA sequence but can affect gene expression. These changes are influenced by various factors such as lifestyle, environment, and age. We measure over hundreds of thousands of CpG locations on your DNA to provide highly accurate and reliable results.

results.title: TruDiscovery Grant
results.content: Supporting researchers with funding and resources to accelerate breakthroughs in epigenetics, drive scientific discovery, and transform the future of personalized medicine. ## Funding Innovation. Selected applicants will receive **$400,000 in funding** to bring their project to life, empowering groundbreaking advancements in the field. Our flagship initiative, the TruDiscovery Grant, provides funding and resources to support high-potential research projects. Access to funding for early-stage and translational research. Access to funding for eThis grant award includes allocations to cover indirect costs, ensuring research sustainability despite NIH funding cuts.arly-stage and translational research. Our mission is to bridge the gap between groundbreaking discoveries and real-world applications, fostering a global network of scientists, entrepreneurs, and institutions committed to transforming healthcare and biotechnology. At TruDiagnostic™, we’re advancing research to better understand aging through innovative DNA methylation studies and epigenetic analysis.
